title: LTX V1
body:
A simple Minecraft modpack focusing on performance and graphics enhancements.

# By using this modpack, you agree to the following disclaimers.

### Performance
BOKOR-FP is faster than competing game clients, thanks to modern performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and others. The bundled mods have been carefully selected to be safe in your worlds and provide noticeable speed benefits on any device.

### Works everywhere
BOKOR-FP does not include content mods, so you can play on any world or server. While you can use any game launcher to play the pack, we recommend and provide support for specific ones that offer the best experience.

### Up to date
BOKOR-FP receives fast updates and stands as one of the first modpacks to upgrade to newer Minecraft versions. Updating the modpack is easy and will preserve your mod settings, where possible.

## FAQ

Q: What mods does it have?

A: Click any version and scroll down or see the comparison table.

Q: I like the modpack. How can I contribute?

A: if you want you can help us with a small donation!

Q: Do I need the modpack on the server?

A: No, the pack works on all servers that allow vanilla clients. A detailed answer and server setup tips are here.
